CustomField.formula: IF( RecordType.Name = 'Billing', IF( OR( ISPICKVAL(Onboarding_Attempt_Status_New__c, "Closed"), ISPICKVAL(Onboarding_Attempt_Status_New__c, "Canceled") ), Billing_Activation_Date_Stamp__c, IF( NOT(ISBLANK(Billing_Activation_Date_Stamp__c)), Billing_Activation_Date_Stamp__c, DATEVALUE(Account__r.School_Object__r.Billing_Activation_Date_2024__c) ) ), NULL )
CustomField.label: Billing Activation Date
